prose:
**Furan Fukui reactivity — computed result.** Method used: chemkit `fukui-reactivity` with DFT, reported level `b3lyp/def2-tzvp` (tier `standard` requested), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied fixed XYZ file `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/furan/furan.xyz` (9 atoms). Partial charges: Mulliken (PySCF). The tool reports the engine integrity verdict as `trustworthy: true`.

Headline result: the most electrophilic site is atom 5 (1-based label), C, with `f_plus = 1.9242931`. The most nucleophilic site is also atom 5, C, with `f_minus = 0.1616371`.

Per-atom Fukui descriptors returned by chemkit:

| atom label | element | f+ | f- | f0 | dual descriptor |
|---:|:---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| 1 | O | -1.3316182 | 0.08382155 | -0.62389834 | -1.4154398 |
| 2 | C | 1.2286866 | 0.089103093 | 0.65889485 | 1.1395835 |
| 3 | C | 1.2270264 | 0.089304821 | 0.65816561 | 1.1377216 |
| 4 | C | 1.9233053 | 0.161527 | 1.0424161 | 1.7617783 |
| 5 | C | 1.9242931 | 0.1616371 | 1.0429651 | 1.762656 |
| 6 | H | -1.2190639 | 0.10248412 | -0.55828991 | -1.3215481 |
| 7 | H | -1.2191056 | 0.1025135 | -0.55829603 | -1.321619 |
| 8 | H | -0.76678308 | 0.10481615 | -0.33098346 | -0.87159923 |
| 9 | H | -0.76674059 | 0.10479266 | -0.33097396 | -0.87153325 |

Warnings: no `warnings` array was returned by the tool result. Integrity checks returned by chemkit were all `ok: true`: `fukui_charge_conservation_f+`, `fukui_charge_conservation_f-`, and `schema_header`.

Reproducibility: exact CLI invocation reported by chemkit: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui --method dft --charge 0 --mult 1 --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/furan/furan.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpqqkbf3b7/live.json`. Plot file returned: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/furan/argo_gpt-5.5/20260706-174958_furan_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_01_plot.png`. A live `.out` log path was not included in the chemkit result JSON I received, so I cannot report one without fabricating it.
